Article: Gainaxingits a guy thing
[]: Gainaxing...its a guy thing             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Nov 10, 2006 4:25 pm [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL]"boing, boing" this pic is a demonstration of the phenomenon known as gainaxing... Gainaxing: 1.The act of meticulously animating the bouncing and wobbling of breasts down to the slightest detail. 2.The act of making a female character's breasts extremely bouyant and overtly busty, regardless of their size. Gainaxes are measured in "Misty Mays"... 1MistyMay = 1 Full Bounce the above picture is gainaxed by a measure of exactly seven MistyMays... Let us make list, recording the amount of gainaxing in Evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 10, 2006 7:30 pm Hey, it can't be a girl thing, too? The only Eva Gainax bounce TM that comes to mind is episode 2 during the dinner scene when Misato yells at Shinji to act more like a man..."You're a boy, aren't you?!" Hehehe. Then the shot becomes very fan-servicy as she says "Isn't this nice?" (Closeup of her butt.) "Eating dinner with someone?" (Closeup of her chest.) :twisted: I might have the order revesered; it's been a while since I've watched that episode. ...Though am I the only one who thinks it's slightly creepy that Asuka is rather busty despite being only 14? Then again, I guess that's anime for you, when female characters DO have regular breast sizes; they're considered flat! ; (ie: Lina Inverse, Usagi
